label: Infra Health & Alerts
info: Consolidated infra health + backup/Zabbix alerts (migrated from HA 28-06-2026). Group A: ih-watch->ih-engine. Group B: 4 http-in. All -> ih-send (type-prefix + quiet-hours 22-07 + 07:00 flush).

name: Rule engine
Quiet-hours send
TrueNAS backup build
MikroTik backup build
Restic failed build
Zabbix alert build
Build PVE task requests
wrap {node,tasks}
func:
msg.payload = { node: msg.node, tasks: (msg.payload && msg.payload.data) || [] };
return msg;

name: Evaluate (alert only on fail)
store maint state
seed maint state
ESBN stale check (>13h)
NR backup build
func:
var b=msg.payload; if(typeof b==='string'){try{b=JSON.parse(b);}catch(e){b={message:b};}}
return {cat:'Backup', sub:'Node-RED repo', message:(b&&b.message)||'Node-RED git backup reported a problem.', tag:'nr_backup'};
